allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data.json'\); const s=d.sheets.find\(s=>s.name==='夏の献立'\); console.log\('name:', s.name\); console.log\('title:', s.title\); console.log\('lines count:', s.lines.length\); console.log\('first line:', JSON.stringify\(s.lines[0]\)\); console.log\('last line:', JSON.stringify\(s.lines[s.lines.length-1]\)\);")
